title: onosma pseudoarenaria subsp. delphinensis
intro: Onosma pseudoarenaria subsp. delphinensis, also known as Delphinium Onosma or Onosma delphinensis, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Onosma pseudoarenaria subsp. delphinensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
